html:
Exclusive to:

The Sanctum Lustre is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Ancient Echoes update. They are commonly found within the Sanctum and serve as light sources. Occasionally, broken Sanctum Lustres can be found on the ground and these do not emit light.

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Sanctum Lustre
Normal
Normal 2
Broken
Object Info
Perk
Emit light.
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_chandelier"
Exclusive to:
“Light's out.”
–Wilson, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Someone could trip on that.”
–Willow, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“That belong on ceiling.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“A bad omen?”
–Wendy, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“MUST HAVE BEEN MOUNTED BY A FLESHBAG”
–WX-78, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“It would appear substandard workmanship has permitted this chandelier to fall from its mounting.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Better keep careful around here.”
–Woodie, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“This place is falling apart.”
–Maxwell, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Whö hath cast thee döwn fröm the heavens, little star?”
–Wigfrid, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“We'll catch the next one!”
–Webber, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Lucky I was not standing under when it fell!”
–Warly, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Ball fall down.”
–Wormwood, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Well that's unsafe.”
–Winona, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Oh dear, the chandelier.”
–Wortox, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Not me, florp.”
–Wurt, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“Wonder what caused that.”
–Walter, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
“I'm surprised it stayed up that long in the first place.”
–Wanda, when examining a broken Sanctum Lustre
The Sanctum Lustre is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Ancient Echoes update. They are commonly found within the Sanctum and serve as light sources. Occasionally, broken Sanctum Lustres can be found on the ground and these do not emit light.

The '''Sanctum Lustre''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Ancient Echoes]]'' update. They are commonly found within the [[Sanctum]] and serve as light sources. Occasionally, broken Sanctum Lustres can be found on the ground and these do not emit light.
{{clear}}
{{Structures}}
